productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Barracks Premier White Sports Shoes
description: A highly versatile trainer, the adidas Barracks Premier shoe is designed to suit several Sports. With reliable performance and absolute impact protection, this pair is a must have for those who enjoy outdoors. Upper Meshed upper for absolute breathability Strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for added shoe structure Perforations on the forefoot and heel overlays for enhanced ventilation adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the medial side in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Midsole PU midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded footbed for all day cushioned comfort Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole Adiprene inserts in the heel for absolute cushioning and impact protection Diamond-shaped lugs on mid forefoot and heel, circular lugs on the lateral forefoot and vertical grooves on the medial forefoot for absolute grip and traction Pivot point on bog toe mound for easy 180 degree moveMent of the foot Scooped heel for air-cushioning Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
